title: Workload Hourly Management

posts.author: streety (James Street)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am one of the designers working in a marketing department and struggling with capacity and workload.

Q. Is there a way to have a timeline/calendar view where jobs can be shown by the hour?

We have an estimated time column for each design job and I would like to say that I am working on job X between a certain time in my workday. I have had a search and can only see it by dates rather than breaking it down to hours.

Any help would be greatly appreciated as I am over capacity!

posts.author: andrewalmand (Andrew Almand)
posts.cookedHtml:
@streety

Have you seen the Hour Column?

image1073×726 61.5 KB

I think using that in conjunction with the right view could help you achieve this. Without knowing more specifics of your board, I can’t comment further. But if you want to share layout/column details or a screenshot I can try to help you utilize this.

posts.author: streety (James Street)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you @andrewalmand I hadn’t seen that column. I will give that a try.
